results.title: Dynamic workflows coordinate parallel agents
results.snippet: Dynamic workflows break a large question into independent research lanes, run agents concurrently, checkpoint progress, and merge verified findings.

results.title: Workflow verification needs adversarial review
results.snippet: Deep research workflows should include a verifier lane that challenges stale claims, missing counterarguments, and source quality before the final report.

results.title: Structured workflow arguments reduce prompt ambiguity
results.snippet: Saved workflow commands should pass JSON arguments such as question, queries, and seedResults instead of appending raw command text to a prompt.

results.title: Hosted web search should prefer primary sources
results.snippet: Research agents that have web-search tools should prefer primary sources, preserve URLs, and explicitly label uncertainty.
